requirements.description: Hero image uses 100% width instead of 100vw
requirements.evidence: hero.tsx: width changed from '100vw' to '100%'; hero.test.tsx: test asserts 100% width

requirements.description: Hero image objectPosition set to center bottom
requirements.evidence: hero.tsx: objectPosition changed to 'center bottom'; hero.test.tsx: test asserts bottom-center position

requirements.description: Hero split animation range widened and transform origins adjusted
requirements.evidence: hero.tsx: split range [0.35,0.65] -> [0.25,0.75], transformOrigin 'center 20%' -> 'center 30%', shadow/bg ranges adjusted

requirements.description: Horizontal overflow hidden on html element
requirements.evidence: globals.css: overflow-x: hidden added to html

requirements.description: Nav scroll-driven text color transition (white to dark)
requirements.evidence: nav.tsx: scroll-driven textColor and textShadow transforms added, hardcoded text-white removed, dynamic color via motion style props

requirements.description: Nav logo is a clickable link
requirements.evidence: nav.tsx: <div> logo replaced with <motion.a href='#'>; nav.test.tsx: test asserts logo is a link

requirements.description: Contact form replaces newsletter section with liquid glass design
requirements.evidence: newsletter-section.tsx: full rewrite with name+email contact form, 7-layer liquid glass CSS (backdrop blur+saturate, glass tint gradient, specular highlight, refraction border, depth shadow, top shine, rounded corners 22px), dark liquid glass submit button

requirements.description: Contact form has proper validation and a11y
requirements.evidence: newsletter-section.tsx: role='alert' and aria-invalid added (task #9 fix); newsletter-section.test.tsx: 8 tests including 3 sad-path validation tests

requirements.description: Hardcoded English strings extracted to i18n
requirements.evidence: 5 strings replaced with t() calls, keys added to en.json and nb.json (task #9)
hero.tsx and nav.tsx: filter blur animations removed (task #9 CRITICAL fix)
nav.tsx: min-h-[44px] added to nav links (task #9)
hero.tsx: redundant will-change removed from hero halves (task #9)

lint.warnings_note: pre-existing, not introduced by this change

security_review.evidence: All env vars are pre-existing (NEXT_PUBLIC_SANITY_PROJECT_ID, NEXT_PUBLIC_SANITY_DATASET, NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL, SANITY_API_READ_TOKEN, REVALIDATE_SECRET)
Only UI component files, CSS, i18n JSON, and test files changed
Contact form uses controlled React state; no dangerouslySetInnerHTML

security_review.check: aria-invalid and role='alert' for form errors

critic_verdicts.notes: 1 MAJOR (hardcoded strings) fixed in task #9. 2 MINOR (prefers-reduced-motion out of scope, error color acceptable).
1 CRITICAL (filter blur) + 4 MAJOR fixed in task #9. 1 MAJOR (SVG filters) pre-existing/out of scope. 4 MINOR pre-existing or handled.
All 6 MAJOR gaps fixed in task #10.

performance_flags.bundle_size: Not measured (no regression expected; only UI component changes)
notes: Filter blur animations removed — improves scroll performance by staying on compositor thread
Redundant will-change removed — reduces GPU memory usage
Pre-existing: WatercolorPlant SVG feTurbulence recomputes every frame on Safari (out of scope)

explicit_gaps: No visual/screenshot regression tests — liquid glass design accuracy requires human review in-browser
No Playwright E2E tests for scroll-driven animations or form interactions
WatercolorPlant SVG filters: pre-existing Safari performance issue (feTurbulence recomputed every frame) — out of scope
OG image hero.png declared as 1200x630 but is a portrait photo — may not match actual dimensions (pre-existing)
Nav text color scroll transition only verifiable visually — no unit test can assert runtime scroll-driven color interpolation
concerns: WatercolorPlant SVG filter performance on Safari remains a pre-existing issue
